headline: Why Is Datadog (DDOG) Up 0.1% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Datadog (DDOG) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Vibe-Coding Won't Kill Datadog: The Case For An Upgrade
summary: Datadog stock is upgraded to "Buy" on strong revenue growth, high retention, and AI tailwinds that justify its premium valuation. Read more macro analysis here.
